data.title: Private equity market to double from USD 19.96 trillion in 2026 to USD 37.85 trillion by 2031, with 13.65% CAGR.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India on January 22, 2026, it was reported that the private equity market was valued at USD 19.96 trillion in 2026. The market is expected to grow significantly, reaching USD 37.85 trillion by 2031, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.65%. This growth showcases the market's transformation from its previous state to a...

data.title: BC.GAME launches exclusive slot "TORTURE BLOCK", featuring high-pressure prison theme with chain reaction mechanics.
data.description: In the bustling city of BELIZE, a new slot game called TORTURE BLOCK has been released by BC.GAME on Jan. 22, 2026. This exclusive game combines a high-pressure prison theme with features designed for chain reactions and late-round excitement. The game's theme and art direction revolve around a brutal setting, offering players a unique gaming experience. Explore TORTURE BLOCK on BC.GAME for an adrenaline-filled adventure.

data.title: Empira Group partners with Optiml for data-driven decision platform to transition to green strategy and create value.
data.description: In recent news from London and Berlin on January 22, 2026, it was announced that Optiml, a highly acclaimed Real Estate Decision Intelligence platform, has been chosen by Empira Group. Empira Group is renowned as a leading vertically integrated real estate investment manager specializing in the residential sector. This collaboration marks a significant development in the real estate industry, combining the expertise of Optiml with the reputation of Empira Group. This partnership is expected to bring about innovative solutions and strategies in real estate investment.

data.title: GE Aerospace expected to report Q4 earnings of $1.43 per share, up from $1.32 last year, with revenue estimate of $11.21 billion. Delta Air Lines selects GEnx engines to power 30 new Boeing 787-10s, impacting GE Aerospace stock.
data.description: GE Aerospace, a NYSE-listed company, is set to unveil its Q4 earnings on Jan. 22. Analysts predict earnings of $1.43 per share, a rise from $1.32 in the same period last year. Revenue forecasts for the quarter stand at $11.21 billion, up from $9.88 billion in the previous year. The company recently announced a deal with Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) for GEnx engines to power 30 new Boeing 787-10s, with an option for 30 more planes, along with spare engines and ongoing service support. Following this news, GE Aerospace's shares surged by 2% to reach $318.50 at the close of trading on Wednesday.

data.title: Strive aims to raise $150M for debt repayment and Bitcoin investment, with possible debt-for-equity swaps to minimize offering size.
data.description: Additionally, the company intends to conduct private debt-for-equity swaps with certain holders of the Semler convertible notes in order to potentially reduce the size of its offering.
